title: Support 2D parameter arrays
body:
The following module compiles in VCS, but fails to compile in Verilator.

Verilator Error: 
```
%Error: example.sv:23:36: Expecting expression to be constant, but variable isn't const: 'hetero_type_vec_p'
                        : ... In instance foo
   23 |                  #(.hetero_type_p( hetero_type_vec_p[r-1][c] ))
      |                                    ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
%Error: example.sv:23:21: Can't convert defparam value to constant: Param 'hetero_type_p' of 'baz_i'
                        : ... In instance foo
   23 |                  #(.hetero_type_p( hetero_type_vec_p[r-1][c] ))
      |                     ^~~~~~~~~~~~~
%Error: Exiting due to 2 error(s)

```

```
module baz
  #(parameter integer hetero_type_p = -1)
   ();

endmodule

module foo
  #(
    parameter integer num_tiles_x_p = 4
    ,parameter integer num_tiles_y_p = 4
    //,parameter integer hetero_type_vec_p [0:num_tiles_y_p-2][0:num_tiles_x_p-1] = '{default:'{default:'0}}                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
    ,parameter integer hetero_type_vec_p [0:num_tiles_y_p-2][0:num_tiles_x_p-1] = '{num_tiles_y_p-1{'{num_tiles_x_p{'0}}}}
    )
   ();

   genvar r, c;

   for (r = 1; r < num_tiles_y_p; r = r+1)
     begin: y
        for (c = 0; c < num_tiles_x_p; c=c+1)
          begin : x
             baz
                 #(.hetero_type_p( hetero_type_vec_p[r-1][c] ))
                   baz_i
                   ();

          end
     end


endmodule
```

I can change `#(.hetero_type_p( hetero_type_vec_p[r-1][c] ))` to `#(.hetero_type_p( hetero_type_vec_p[0][0] ))` and the error does not change. 


Alternatively, I can pass hetero_type_vec_p as a parameter to baz and index it there. This fails with the error: 

```
%Error: example.sv:10:40: Expecting expression to be constant, but variable isn't const: 'hetero_type_vec_p'
                        : ... In instance foo.y[1].x[0].baz_i
   10 |     ,parameter integer hetero_type_p = hetero_type_vec_p[idx_y][idx_x]
      |                                        ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)
```


```
module baz
  #(
    parameter integer num_tiles_x_p = 4
    , parameter [$clog2(num_tiles_x_p)-1:0] idx_x  = 0
    , parameter integer num_tiles_y_p = 4
    , parameter [$clog2(num_tiles_y_p-1)-1:0] idx_y  = 0
    //,parameter integer hetero_type_vec_p [0:num_tiles_y_p-2][0:num_tiles_x_p-1] = '{default:'0}                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
    ,parameter integer hetero_type_vec_p [0:num_tiles_y_p-2][0:num_tiles_x_p-1] = '{num_tiles_y_p-1{'{num_tiles_x_p{'0}}}}

    ,parameter integer hetero_type_p = hetero_type_vec_p[idx_y][idx_x]
    )
   ();

endmodule

module foo
  #(
    parameter integer num_tiles_x_p = 4
    ,parameter integer num_tiles_y_p = 4
    ,parameter integer hetero_type_vec_p [0:num_tiles_y_p-2][0:num_tiles_x_p-1] = '{num_tiles_y_p-1{'{num_tiles_x_p{'0}}}}
    )
   ();

   genvar r, c;

   for (r = 1; r < num_tiles_y_p; r = r+1)
     begin: y
        for (c = 0; c < num_tiles_x_p; c=c+1)
          begin : x
             baz
                 #(.hetero_type_vec_p(hetero_type_vec_p))
                   baz_i
                   ();

          end
     end


endmodule
```


Any thoughts on how to fix this? Running with `Verilator 4.032 2020-04-04 rev v4.032` compiled on Centos 7. Happy to try solutions or hack a little bit of C++.
